message:
Fix EPIC dependency structure per bv diagnostics

- Add y1p EPIC dependencies on child beads (qqw, h10, tjd, p0u)
- Add 0vx EPIC dependencies on child beads (r2n, 0a0, 9r7, 4v1, rpf)
- Add zfn EPIC dependencies on child beads (fxd)
- Add 9mq Integration EPIC dependencies on all RaptorQ EPICs
  (0vx, y1p, zfn, ucq, 3u7, 6ll, 3nm)
- Add bsx Epoch EPIC dependencies on child beads (573, 2vt)
- Add cross-EPIC dependencies: zfn→0vx, ucq→0vx, y1p→0vx
- Add sibling dependencies: tjd→h10, p0u→h10
- Link bd-hzrb harmonization bead to xrc and n5o

These fixes ensure EPICs properly depend on their sub-tasks and that
cross-EPIC dependencies match the architecture documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
